subject: grammar
title: Exercise 1A
instruction: Fill in the gaps with the correct form of the verbs in brackets.

questions.text: I'm busy right now. I ___ (fill in) an application form for a new job.
My tutor ___ (see) me for a tutorial every Monday at two o'clock.
John ___ (not/study) very hard at the moment.
Animals ___ (breathe in) oxygen and carbon dioxide.
Animals breathe in oxygen and ___ (give out) carbon dioxide.
Be quiet! I ___ (want) to hear the news.
In my country we ___ (drive) on the right-hand side of the road.
My friend Joe's parents ___ (travel) round the world this summer, and probably won't be back for a couple of months.
The college ___ (run) the same course every year.
Numbers of wild butterflies ___ (fall) as a result of changes in farming methods.
